arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy told he has four key traits to replace Erik ten Hag as Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy may have became a Manchester United legend on the pitch, but Rene Meuelensteen believes he has the right stuff to guide them to glory from the side lines should Erik ten Hag be shown the door

arts.ttl: Manchester United duo snubbed in latest England squad as Lee Carsley makes shock decision
arts.sum: United duo Harry Maguire and Marcus Rashford will be staying in Manchester during the international break

arts.ttl: 'I'm a Man Utd Treble winner – but Sir Alex Ferguson almost sacked me'
arts.sum: Peter Schmeichel has admitted that his behaviour at Manchester United was so out of order at one point, that Sir Alex Ferguson threatened to sack him

arts.ttl: Peter Schmeichel and Roy Keane put fiery Man Utd relationship on hold for Celtic love-in
arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel is the No. 1 goalkeeper at Celtic Park this season

arts.ttl: BREAKING: England squad announced as Harry Maguire and three others axed as Cole Palmer returns
arts.sum: Lee Carsley has made a number of major changes to his England squad for the upcoming internationals, with Cole Palmer and Jude Bellingham both fit and returning

arts.ttl: England confirm 25-man Nations League squad as Dominic Solanke, Harry Maguire decisions made
arts.sum: England announce their 25-man squad for their upcoming Nations League matches with Greece and Finland, as Dominic Solanke returns for the first time in seven years.

arts.ttl: Man Utd to offer Maguire new deal

arts.ttl: Two recent Man United signings already under threat as Red Devils join race for Arsenal target
arts.sum: Manchester United have perhaps signalled they’re already thinking seriously about replacing struggling attacking duo Joshua Zirkzee and Rasmus Hojlund, with Benjamin Sesko reportedly on their radar. Sesko has impressed at RB Leipzig and attracted plenty of headlines in the summer when it looked like his future could be in some doubt, though he ended up […] The post Two recent Man United signings already under threat as Red Devils join race for Arsenal target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag handed worst nightmare ahead of Aston Villa vs Manchester United
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag faces two crucial games in the next four days and Sunday's trip to Aston Villa has just become even more daunting.
